group.name: Fast motion
group.description: Fast versions of Photonics' default motion cues

cues.name: Vogue
cues.description: On each measure, every light moves to its own random stage bearing over 800ms (set-position).

cues.name: Wave
cues.description: Horizontal linear sweep ±20° from home; half-cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 120).

cues.name: Nod
cues.description: Vertical linear sweep toward downstage and back; one full cycle per beat (speed = BPM / 60). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Clockwise Sync
cues.description: Circle pattern; one full orbit per 4/4 measure (speed = BPM / 240).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Sync
cues.description: Same as Clockwise Sync with reverse direction.

cues.name: Clockwise Fan Spread
cues.description: Circle with 360° fan spread so fixtures are evenly phased around the orbit; measure-synced speed (BPM / 240).

cues.name: Counter-Clockwise Fan Spread
cues.description: Same as Clockwise Fan Spread with reverse direction.

cues.name: Pendulum
cues.description: Pan/tilt parabolic back-and-forth (sine pan, cosine tilt at 2x); one full cycle per two beats (speed = BPM / 120). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Figure-8
cues.description: Infinity / figure-8 Lissajous in pan/tilt (sine pan, sine tilt at 2x); one full cycle per two beats (speed = BPM / 120). Started on cue-started.

cues.name: Cross Beat
cues.description: Each beat, even fixtures tilt 30 degrees toward stage-right while odd fixtures tilt 30 degrees toward stage-left; sides swap each beat. Duration tracks beat length.

cues.name: Pendulum Fan Spread
cues.description: Pan/tilt parabolic back-and-forth (sine pan, cosine tilt at 2x); one full cycle per two beats (speed = BPM / 120). Started on cue-started.
